title: polygala chinensis var. triflora
intro: Polygala chinensis var. triflora, also known as Yuan Zhi, is a variant of the Polygala chinensis plant, which is a type of flowering plant native to China and other parts of Asia. It is believed to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The plant is said to offer several health benefits, including improving sleep quality, reducing anxiety and stress, and boosting the immune system. In traditional Chinese medicine, Polygala chinensis var. triflora is often prepared as a tea or dried root extract, and is also used in combination with other herbs to create various herbal remedies.
